_doc: Quarantine manifest for known-flaky tests. See scripts/ci/check-quarantine.mjs for the validation rules. Each entry MUST have an issue link and an `expires` date within 30 days of `added`. Manifest is empty by default; never add an entry without first opening a tracking issue.

vitest.reason: Burst of 30 parallel Edge Function calls intermittently exceeds the per-test timeout in CI even after raising it to 60s. Network latency to the Supabase Edge runtime is the dominant factor; logic-level assertions (zero leaks, zero 5xx, stable error codes) are stable when the test does complete.
